name: Quick Toffee Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate and stir often.
2. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream until smooth.
3. Cut the pound cake horizontally into two layers.
4. Place one cake layer on a serving plate. Spread with one-third of the frosting and sprinkle with one-third of the chopped candy.
5. Top with the second cake layer.
6. Frost the entire cake with remaining frosting.
7. Sprinkle the top with the remaining chopped candy.
